creator: cheunghonyu@gmail.com
text:
The following is poudriere log

=======================<phase: check-config >==========================
=======================================================================
=======================<phase: fetch        >==========================
===>   libxul-10.0.12 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> firefox-10.0.12esr.source.tar.bz2 doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch https://ftp.mozilla.org/pub/mozilla.org/firefox/releases/10.0.12esr/source/firefox-10.0.12esr.source.tar.bz2
firefox-10.0.12esr.source.tar.bz2                       72 MB 1689 kBps
===> Fetching all distfiles required by libxul-10.0.12 for building
=======================================================================
=======================<phase: checksum     >==========================
===>   libxul-10.0.12 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
===> Fetching all distfiles required by libxul-10.0.12 for building
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for firefox-10.0.12esr.source.tar.bz2.
=======================================================================
=======================<phase: extract      >==========================
===>   libxul-10.0.12 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
===> Fetching all distfiles required by libxul-10.0.12 for building
===>  Extracting for libxul-10.0.12
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for firefox-10.0.12esr.source.tar.bz2.
=======================================================================
=======================<phase: patch        >==========================
===>  Patching for libxul-10.0.12
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for libxul-10.0.12
Syntax error: redirection unexpected
*** [gecko-post-patch] Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/www/libxul.

How-To-Repeat: Updating ports source after 16 May 2013, www/libxul fails to build in patch phrase.
